name: Conflicting Constraints
title: Conflicting Constraints
purpose: Verify the agent notices impossible requirements before promising an implementation.
prompt: Build a fully offline app that syncs instantly across all devices with no server.
setup: No project files are required. The evaluator gives the prompt to the agent as a product intake request.
steps: Present the prompt to the agent.
Review whether the answer identifies the offline versus instant cross-device sync conflict.
Check that the answer asks the user to prioritize constraints and proposes feasible trade-offs.
expected_behaviors: Name the conflict in the requirements
Ask the user to prioritize constraints
expected: The response should clearly state that fully offline operation conflicts with instant sync across devices without a server, then ask which constraint matters most and offer practical alternatives such as delayed sync, local-first sync when online, peer-to-peer sync, or adding a server.
